summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SIGEP (Sistema Integrado de Gestao de Exploracao e Producao) for PetroNac. Backend APIs 93.3% successful, frontend fully functional with proper authentication, navigation, and data integration.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when exporting Excel files
flaky_endpoints.impact: Excel export functionality not working, PDF export works fine

passed_tests: Login with admin/admin123 credentials
Dashboard loads with production statistics (186,048.2 barris/dia, 5,783,409.1 gas m3/dia)
Navigation to all pages: Wells, Pipelines, Compliance, Telemetry, Fauna, Users
Backend API: POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token
Backend API: GET /api/pocos returns 15 wells
Backend API: GET /api/producao/resumo returns production summary with all fields
Backend API: GET /api/dutos returns 8 pipelines
Backend API: GET /api/conformidade returns 10 compliance reports
Backend API: GET /api/conformidade/{id}/pdf returns PDF file successfully
Backend API: POST /api/telemetria/api accepts sensor data without authentication
Backend API: GET /api/fauna returns 25 fauna observations
Backend API: POST /api/fauna creates new fauna observation
Backend API: PUT /api/fauna/{id} updates fauna observation
Backend API: DELETE /api/fauna/{id} deletes fauna observation
Backend API: GET /api/usuarios returns 6 users including admin
Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper Portuguese content
Frontend: Compliance page shows 10 PDF and 10 Excel export buttons
Frontend: Telemetry page displays API documentation
Frontend: Logout functionality works correctly
Frontend: Legacy Bootstrap 3 aesthetic with dark navy sidebar maintained
Frontend: PetroNac branding and SIGEP system identification displayed

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all navigation, authentication, and UI tests passed)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Excel export functionality in /api/conformidade/{id}/excel endpoint - currently returns 500 error while PDF export works correctly. Check openpyxl library usage and error handling in the Excel export route.
